  • Constructor Details

    • FigGroup

      public FigGroup(List<String> value, int columns, boolean horizontalLayout, float ratio)
      Widget that can be used to combine Fig entries into groups
      Parameters:
      value - List of strings containing the field names of the desired config values
      columns - Number of columns to split the Figs provided in value into
      horizontalLayout - Determines if the option label should be displayed beside (true) or above (false) the option entry.
      ratio - If horizontalLayout is true, this will determine the ratio between label and entry.
      Example: 0.2f would mean 20% entry and 80% label
